sentences.sentence: When movies made in one language are shown to speakers of another, the two methods of resolving the language barrier are subtitling and dubbing.
sentences.translation: 当一种语言制作的电影放映给另一种语言的观众时，解决语言障碍有两种方法：字幕翻译和配音。

structure.text: When movies made in one language are shown to speakers of another
made in one language
the two methods of resolving the language barrier
are subtitling and dubbing

difficult_points: made in one language 是过去分词短语，修饰 movies。
another 后省略了 language；主句用 are 连接 methods 与两种具体方法。

sentences.sentence: Subtitling is the written translation of the words, usually appearing discreetly at the bottom of the screen, while dubbing is the recording of voices in the target language.
sentences.translation: 字幕翻译是对台词进行书面翻译，通常低调地显示在屏幕底部；而配音则是用目标语言录制对白。

structure.text: Subtitling is the written translation of the words
usually appearing discreetly at the bottom of the screen
while dubbing is the recording of voices in the target language

difficult_points: appearing... 是现在分词短语，补充说明字幕出现的位置和方式。
while 在此表达对比而非时间，区分字幕与配音。

expressions.text: at the bottom of the screen

sentences.sentence: Dubbing, although seemingly more accessible to movie watches, comes with many disadvantages.
sentences.translation: 配音虽然看似更容易被电影观众接受，却也伴随着许多缺点。

structure.text: Dubbing
although seemingly more accessible to movie watches
comes with many disadvantages

difficult_points: although 后省略了 it is，构成让步性的省略结构。
原文 movie watches 应为 movie watchers 的拼写异常，指电影观众。

sentences.sentence: For a start, it is expensive, hence it needs a large audience to justify the cost, yet even big films carry no guarantee of such commercial success.
sentences.translation: 首先，配音成本高昂，因此需要大量观众才能证明这笔投入值得；然而，即使是大片也无法保证取得这样的商业成功。

structure.text: For a start, it is expensive
hence it needs a large audience to justify the cost
yet even big films carry no guarantee of such commercial success

difficult_points: it 在前两个分句中都指 dubbing；hence 引出成本高带来的结果。
yet 引出反转：即使观众基数可能很大的大片也不能保证商业回报。

sentences.sentence: In addition, the dubbed voices may seem detached or inappropriate to the characters, or otherwise, the absurdity of having an undereducated American ranffian saying. 'Je voudrais déclarer un vol' becomes too much, affecting appreciation of the film.
sentences.translation: 此外，配音后的声音可能显得与人物脱节或不相称；又或者，让一个没受过多少教育的美国恶棍说出法语“我要报案说有盗窃”，其荒诞感会过于强烈，从而影响观众欣赏影片。

structure.text: the dubbed voices may seem detached or inappropriate to the characters
the absurdity of having an undereducated American ranffian saying. 'Je voudrais déclarer un vol'
becomes too much
affecting appreciation of the film

difficult_points: detached or inappropriate 是 seem 后的并列表语，说明声音与角色不协调。
having...saying... 是介词 of 后的动名词结构；原文 ranffian 应为 ruffian，且 saying 后句点属于异常断句。
affecting... 是现在分词结果状语，说明荒诞感造成的影响。

sentences.sentence: Finally, films and TV programs now have an increasingly rapid turnover rate, and subtitling is faster and more practical in such situations.
sentences.translation: 最后，如今电影和电视节目的更新速度越来越快，在这种情况下，字幕翻译更迅速也更实用。

structure.text: films and TV programs now have an increasingly rapid turnover rate
and subtitling is faster and more practical
in such situations

difficult_points: turnover rate 在此指影视内容更新和更替的速度。
such situations 回指节目周转速度加快的制作环境。

sentences.sentence: However, one should not assume subtitling is easier than dubbing.
sentences.translation: 不过，人们不应想当然地认为字幕翻译比配音容易。

structure.text: one
should not assume
subtitling is easier than dubbing

difficult_points: one 是泛指代词，表示一般意义上的“人们”。
assume 后省略了宾语从句连接词 that。

sentences.sentence: Subtitling requires careful strategies, and here I will outline some of them.
sentences.translation: 字幕翻译需要谨慎的策略，下面我将概述其中几种。

structure.text: Subtitling requires careful strategies
and here I will outline some of them

difficult_points: them 指前半句的 strategies。
here 不是单纯地点副词，而是提示下文将开始介绍策略。

sentences.sentence: In order to do this, a sample movie is needed, and the one examined here is an Italian movie subtitled into English.
sentences.translation: 为了说明这些策略，需要选取一部样片；这里考察的是一部配有英文字幕的意大利电影。

structure.text: In order to do this
a sample movie is needed
and the one examined here is an Italian movie
subtitled into English

difficult_points: this 指概述字幕策略这件事；the one 用来替代重复的 sample movie。
examined here 与 subtitled into English 都是过去分词短语，分别修饰 one 和 movie。

sentences.sentence: Comprehension of subtitles will always be affected by lack of familiarity with the values, beliefs, and interactive differences between the host and viewing cultures.
sentences.translation: 如果不熟悉原文化与观众文化在价值观、信念和互动方式上的差异，对字幕的理解就总会受到影响。

structure.text: Comprehension of subtitles
will always be affected
by lack of familiarity with the values, beliefs, and interactive differences
between the host and viewing cultures

difficult_points: by 短语说明字幕理解受到影响的原因。
host culture 指影片来源文化，viewing culture 指观众所在文化；between 修饰 differences。

sentences.sentence: The subtitlers need to be aware of this in order to translate true meaning.
sentences.translation: 字幕译者必须意识到这一点，才能译出真正的含义。

structure.text: The subtitlers
need to be aware of this
in order to translate true meaning

difficult_points: this 指上一句所说两种文化之间的价值观、信念和互动差异。
in order to 引出字幕译者关注文化差异的目的。

sentences.sentence: Thus, before beginning any work, a brief 'cultural audit' is absolutely necessary, involving a comparison of the two cultures in relation to the storyline of the movie.
sentences.translation: 因此，在开始任何工作之前，绝对有必要进行一次简短的“文化审查”，即结合电影情节比较两种文化。

structure.text: before beginning any work
a brief 'cultural audit'
is absolutely necessary
involving a comparison of the two cultures in relation to the storyline of the movie

difficult_points: before beginning... 是省略主语的时间结构，逻辑主语是字幕译者。
involving... 补充解释 cultural audit 的具体内容。

sentences.sentence: The movie is set in the late 1960s, at a time when the wealth and materialism of American society was very high, contrasting the relative poverty of Italian village life.
sentences.translation: 电影背景设在20世纪60年代末，当时美国社会高度富裕且物质主义盛行，与意大利乡村生活的相对贫困形成鲜明对比。

structure.text: The movie is set in the late 1960s
at a time when the wealth and materialism of American society was very high
when the wealth and materialism of American society was very high
contrasting the relative poverty of Italian village life

difficult_points: when 修饰 a time，说明20世纪60年代末的社会背景。
contrasting... 是现在分词短语，说明美国社会与意大利乡村生活的反差。
并列主语 wealth and materialism 后原文使用 was，属于源文数的一致异常。

expressions.meaning_zh: 与……的相对贫困形成对比

sentences.sentence: The plot tells the story of a poor couple who dream of winning large sums of money by gambling in a card game against a wealthy elderly American woman, who occasionally visits Italy just for that purpose.
sentences.translation: 影片讲述一对贫穷夫妇的故事：他们梦想通过与一位富有的美国老妇人赌牌赢得巨款，而这位老妇人偶尔到意大利来，正是为了赌牌。

structure.text: The plot tells the story of a poor couple
who dream of winning large sums of money by gambling in a card game against a wealthy elderly American woman
by gambling in a card game
who occasionally visits Italy just for that purpose

difficult_points: 第一个 who 修饰 a poor couple，第二个 who 修饰 American woman。
by gambling... 说明赢取巨款的方式；that purpose 指参加这场赌牌。

sentences.sentence: The final thematic assertion that there are more important factors than money reflects the warmth and solidarity of the Italian village in the face of adversity.
sentences.translation: 影片最终提出的主题——世上还有比金钱更重要的因素——体现了意大利村庄面对逆境时的温情与团结。

structure.text: The final thematic assertion
that there are more important factors than money
reflects the warmth and solidarity of the Italian village
in the face of adversity

difficult_points: that 从句是 assertion 的同位语，解释影片最后表达的主题。
in the face of adversity 表示村民在逆境之下表现出的温情和团结。

sentences.sentence: Although these themes are universal, one could speculate that a Western audience might not like or identify with them as much, give the increasing urbanisation and materialism of their own society.
sentences.translation: 尽管这些主题具有普遍性，但考虑到西方社会自身日益加剧的城市化和物质主义，人们可以推测西方观众未必会同样喜欢或认同这些主题。

structure.text: Although these themes are universal
one could speculate
that a Western audience might not like or identify with them as much
give the increasing urbanisation and materialism of their own society

difficult_points: them 指上一句所概括的影片主题；like 与 identify with 是并列谓语。
as much 表示西方观众的喜爱或认同程度可能没有那么高。
原文 give 按语境应为 given，表示“考虑到”。

sentences.sentence: The most immediate translation issue relates to the movie's title, 'Lo Scopone Scientifico',translates as 'Scientific Scopone', whereas the English title is, 'The Scientific Card Player'.'Scopone' is the name of a traditional Italian card game of great antiquity.
sentences.translation: 最直接的翻译问题与片名有关：《Lo Scopone Scientifico》直译为“科学斯科波内”，而英文片名却是《科学纸牌玩家》。“Scopone”是一种历史非常悠久的意大利传统纸牌游戏。

structure.text: The most immediate translation issue relates to the movie's title
'Lo Scopone Scientifico',translates as 'Scientific Scopone'
whereas the English title is, 'The Scientific Card Player'
'Scopone' is the name of a traditional Italian card game of great antiquity

difficult_points: whereas 引出意大利文直译与实际英文片名之间的对比。
原文 title 后的同位内容语法不完整，且逗号后及两句之间缺少空格，因此为保证原文完整合并处理。
of great antiquity 表示这种纸牌游戏历史非常悠久。

sentences.sentence: Obviously, the translators could not use this name, obscure to the Westren viewers, but they insert a blander and inappropriate term.
sentences.translation: 显然，译者不能使用这个西方观众不熟悉的名称，但他们换上的说法却更平淡，而且并不恰当。

structure.text: the translators could not use this name
obscure to the Westren viewers
but they insert a blander and inappropriate term

difficult_points: obscure to... 是形容词短语，补充说明 this name 对观众而言生僻。
原文 Westren 应为 Western；insert 使用一般现在时，与前面的 could not 在时态上不一致，均按原文保留。

sentences.sentence: An even clearer subtitling lapse is that the betting is always done using, apparently, ludicrously high figures.
sentences.translation: 一个更明显的字幕失误是，影片中的下注金额看起来总是高得荒唐。

structure.text: An even clearer subtitling lapse
is
that the betting is always done using, apparently, ludicrously high figures

difficult_points: that 从句作表语，具体说明 subtitling lapse 是什么。
using... 是方式状语；apparently 是插入语，表示从字幕呈现看来金额高得离谱。

sentences.sentence: Subtitles such as, 'Let's start with a million' regularly jump out.
sentences.translation: 像“我们从一百万开始下注”这样的字幕经常显得格外突兀。

structure.text: Subtitles such as, 'Let's start with a million'
regularly jump out

difficult_points: such as 后引出具体字幕例子；原文 such as 后多了逗号。
jump out 在此不是“跳出来”，而是指内容显眼、突兀。

sentences.sentence: This is a literal translation of the figures (in Italian lira), yet it is the dollar with which the English-speaking audience would associate.
sentences.translation: 这些数字是按意大利里拉直译的，但英语观众会把这样的金额联想到美元。

structure.text: This is a literal translation of the figures (in Italian lira)
yet it is the dollar
with which the English-speaking audience would associate

difficult_points: This 指前一句中“一百万”等金额字幕；括号说明原数字的币种是意大利里拉。
with which 是介词前置的定语从句，语义为 audience would associate the figures with the dollar；原句省略了明确宾语。

sentences.sentence: The result is an apparent lack of plausibility, changing the comedic nature of the film.
sentences.translation: 结果是影片显得缺乏可信度，其喜剧性质也因此发生了改变。

structure.text: The result
is an apparent lack of plausibility
changing the comedic nature of the film

difficult_points: The result 指币种直译使英语观众误以为赌注以美元计价的后果。
changing... 是现在分词结果状语，表示可信度问题进一步改变了影片的喜剧效果。

sentences.sentence: With respect to the specific subtitling used, there are five.
sentences.translation: 就影片采用的具体字幕策略而言，共有五种。

structure.text: With respect to the specific subtitling used
used
there are five

difficult_points: With respect to 用于引出讨论主题。
used 是过去分词，修饰 subtitling；five 后省略了 strategies。

sentences.sentence: Let us begin with the subtitle, 'The old bag's here.'
sentences.translation: 我们先来看这句字幕：“那个老太婆来了。”

structure.text: Let us
begin with the subtitle
'The old bag's here.'

difficult_points: Let us begin... 是用于组织论述的祈使表达。
引号内容是 subtitle 的同位语，old bag 是带侮辱色彩的习语。

sentences.sentence: This is idiomatic in English, being an insulting term for an elderly woman.
sentences.translation: 这是英语中的习惯说法，是对老年女性的侮辱性称呼。

structure.text: This is idiomatic in English
being an insulting term for an elderly woman

difficult_points: This 指上一句的 old bag。
being... 是现在分词短语，补充解释该表达的具体语用含义。

sentences.sentence: However, it is a simple expression comprising only two words, one of which is literally intended('old').
sentences.translation: 不过，这个表达结构简单，只有两个词，其中一个词 old 仍取其字面意义。

structure.text: it is a simple expression
comprising only two words
one of which is literally intended('old')

difficult_points: comprising... 修饰 expression，说明它只由两个词构成。
one of which 中 which 指 two words；原文 intended('old') 缺空格，语义是 old 取字面义。

sentences.sentence: I would speculate that the same idiom occurs in Italian (that is, the direct translation of'old' and 'bag' in Italian carries the same idiomatic meaning).
sentences.translation: 我推测意大利语中也有相同的习语，也就是说，把 old 和 bag 直接译成意大利语后，仍具有相同的习语含义。

structure.text: I would speculate
that the same idiom occurs in Italian
that is, the direct translation of'old' and 'bag' in Italian carries the same idiomatic meaning

difficult_points: that 从句是 speculate 的宾语；would 使推测语气更审慎。
括号中 that is 引出改述；原文 of'old' 之间缺少空格。

sentences.sentence: This is the strategy of Transfer, where the full expression without time or space consideration is given.
sentences.translation: 这就是“直接转移”策略，即不考虑时间或空间限制，完整呈现原表达。

structure.text: This is the strategy of Transfer
where the full expression without time or space consideration is given

difficult_points: This 指将完整习语直接对应呈现的方法。
where 引导非限制性定语从句，解释 Transfer 策略的操作方式。

sentences.sentence: Otherwise, there could well be a closely aligned idiom, in which case the strategy would be Imitation, where there are similar lexical elements between both languages.
sentences.translation: 另一种可能是，两种语言中存在高度对应的习语；在这种情况下采用的便是“模仿”策略，即两种语言之间具有相似的词汇成分。

structure.text: there could well be a closely aligned idiom
in which case the strategy would be Imitation
where there are similar lexical elements between both languages

difficult_points: could well 表示“很可能”；closely aligned 指两种语言中的习语高度对应。
in which case 承接前述可能性；where 从句进一步解释 Imitation 的特征。

sentences.sentence: Continuing with idioms, we read, 'Catches win matches'.
sentences.translation: 继续讨论习语，我们看到一句字幕：“接球赢比赛。”

structure.text: Continuing with idioms
we read
'Catches win matches'

difficult_points: Continuing... 是现在分词状语，逻辑主语是 we。
Catches win matches 是押韵的体育习语，强调成功接球有助于获胜。

sentences.sentence: This derives from certain ball games, such as cricket, where catching the ball after it is struck by the batsman contributes towards winning the game.
sentences.translation: 这个说法源自某些球类运动，例如板球；在板球中，击球手击球后将球接住有助于赢得比赛。

structure.text: This derives from certain ball games
such as cricket
where catching the ball after it is struck by the batsman contributes towards winning the game
after it is struck by the batsman

difficult_points: This 指上一句习语；where 修饰 cricket，解释该说法的运动背景。
catching the ball 是动名词短语作主语；it 指 ball。

sentences.sentence: There are no such sporting cultures in Italy followed.
sentences.translation: 意大利并没有人们会参与或关注的这种体育文化。

structure.text: There are no such sporting cultures
in Italy
followed

difficult_points: 原句语序生硬，followed 语义上是过去分词，修饰 sporting cultures。
such sporting cultures 指板球等孕育“接球制胜”说法的运动文化。

sentences.sentence: Thus, one can be certain that other words were used in the original Italian, but that these have a similar pragmatic effect (in meaning and idiomatic nature).
sentences.translation: 因此可以确定，意大利语原文使用的是别的词语，但这些词在含义和习语性质上产生了相似的语用效果。

structure.text: one can be certain
that other words were used in the original Italian
but that these have a similar pragmatic effect
in meaning and idiomatic nature

difficult_points: 两个 that 从句由 but 连接，都是 be certain 的内容。
these 指 original Italian 中使用的 other words；括号限定 pragmatic effect 的具体层面。

sentences.sentence: The strategy used is thus Paraphrasing, where different expressions specific to the source language (Italian) and target language(English) are required.
sentences.translation: 因此这里使用的是“释义改写”策略，即源语言（意大利语）和目标语言（英语）需要采用各自特有但效果相近的不同表达。

structure.text: The strategy used
is thus Paraphrasing
where different expressions specific to the source language (Italian) and target language(English) are required

difficult_points: used 是过去分词，修饰 strategy；where 从句解释 Paraphrasing 的做法。
specific to... 修饰 expressions；原文 language(English) 之间缺少空格。

sentences.sentence: Later on, we read, 'A sign of destiny'.
sentences.translation: 稍后，我们又看到一句字幕：“命运的征兆。”

structure.text: Later on
we read
'A sign of destiny'

difficult_points: Later on 用于推进影片例证的时间顺序。
引号内容是 read 的宾语，destiny 在此指命运的安排。

sentences.sentence: When this subtitle appears, there are actually two to three people speaking with equal force at the same time.
sentences.translation: 这句字幕出现时，实际上有两三个人同时以同样强的语气说话。

structure.text: When this subtitle appears
there are actually two to three people
speaking with equal force at the same time

difficult_points: speaking... 是现在分词短语，修饰 two to three people。
with equal force 表示几位说话者的重要性或语气强度相当。

sentences.sentence: Space and time constraints render it impossible to have them all translated, so only the quoted subtitle appears, using the strategy known as Condensation.
sentences.translation: 空间和时间限制使得无法把他们所有人的话都译出来，因此画面上只出现了所引的这一句字幕，采用的是“压缩”策略。

structure.text: Space and time constraints render it impossible
to have them all translated
so only the quoted subtitle appears
using the strategy known as Condensation

difficult_points: render it impossible to... 中 it 是形式宾语，真正内容是不定式。
have them all translated 是 have + 宾语 + 过去分词，表示让所有人的话都得到翻译。
known as Condensation 是过去分词短语，修饰 strategy。

sentences.sentence: Finally, we read scopa – an Italian word referring to a variation of the central card game.
sentences.translation: 最后，我们看到 scopa 一词——这是一个意大利语词，指影片核心纸牌游戏的一种变体。

structure.text: we read scopa
an Italian word
referring to a variation of the central card game

difficult_points: 破折号后的 an Italian word 是 scopa 的同位语。
referring to... 是现在分词短语，修饰 word 并解释其所指。

sentences.sentence: Being unique to Italy, there is no equivalent word in English, so the strategy used here is Regination, where the subtitler leaves the word in the original language.
sentences.translation: 由于这个词是意大利独有的，英语中没有对应词，所以这里采用的是“保留原文”策略，即字幕译者把该词留在原语言中。

structure.text: Being unique to Italy
there is no equivalent word in English
so the strategy used here is Regination
where the subtitler leaves the word in the original language

difficult_points: Being unique to Italy 逻辑上修饰 scopa，但形式上与紧随其后的 there 存在悬垂结构。
used here 修饰 strategy；where 从句解释该策略如何操作。
Regination 是源文给出的策略名称，英文保留原样。

expressions.text: leave the word in the original language

sentences.sentence: The meaning remains obvious from the context, and only in such minimal and unlikely situations does this strategy become acceptable.
sentences.translation: 这个词的含义从语境中仍然显而易见，而且只有在这种极少出现、可能性很低的情况下，这一策略才可以接受。

structure.text: The meaning remains obvious from the context
and only in such minimal and unlikely situations
does this strategy become acceptable

difficult_points: remain obvious 中 obvious 是主语补足语，from the context 说明判断依据。
only + 状语置于分句开头触发部分倒装，因此 does 位于主语之前。
